title: Hellbringer - Diablo the card game (Review)
body:
In this video, we take a look at Hellbringer, a card game designed to capture the character-building, combo-building, and combat mechanics reminiscent of Diablo. Daniel highlights that while the game lacks exploration, it does a great job of focusing on those key elements. He also points out the variety of loot, skills, and the opportunity to create interesting combinations, especially as you build your character. The game includes several classes, item cards, expansions, and campaign options, which Daniel explains throughout the video. He notes that while the rulebook is decent, learning from the designer’s online videos makes it easier to grasp the gameplay. Daniel also discusses the game’s expansions, which he feels should be part of the base game due to how much they add.

Overall, Daniel’s review is an endorsement, expressing satisfaction with his decision to back the game on Kickstarter, especially for solo or two-player sessions. The game’s design offers a lot of creative potential, making it fun for fans of Diablo-style gameplay.
